description: Negative/error-path: Sending {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"unknownMethod","params":{"channel":"ahp-root://"}} returns error.code === -32601. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32601.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: rpc.MethodNotFound.error.unknown-method. Any method name the server does not recognise MUST elicit a MethodNotFound (-32601) JSON-RPC error per the JSON-RPC 2.0 spec.

steps.label: send unknownMethod to trigger the error condition
